title: TODO: short title
description: A new version v1.2.0 is ready to deploy but has not been promoted. current_version still points to v1.1.0. releases/v1.2.0/status.txt reads broken (the pre-deploy health check placeholder). The task is to promote v1.2.0, validate it, and complete the deployment.
hint_1: check target_version to find what should be promoted
hint_2: validate the new version and mark it healthy
hint_3: promote it by writing to current_version
hint_4: echo healthy > releases/v1.2.0/status.txt && echo v1.2.0 > current_version && echo complete > deploy.state
